display.purpose: Page-level hero headings. Used once per route view, never on cards.

headline.purpose: Section titles within a page, paired with SectionEyebrow.

title.purpose: Card headings and capability names in dense catalog views.

body.purpose: Narrative and descriptive text. Max 52-56ch line length.

label.purpose: Supporting text, card descriptions, secondary copy.

mono-label.purpose: Structured platform vocabulary: topic types, categories, authority levels, API codes, channel names. Uppercase only.

shadows.name: state-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover elevation signal on interactive cards. State-only; never static.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus ring on search inputs. Companion to the border-color shift to Platform Blue.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for color, border, and shadow state transitions.

motion.name: ease-transform
motion.purpose: Arrow icon micro-translations on card hover.

motion.name: theme-reveal
motion.value: clip-path circle-expand via View Transitions API
motion.purpose: Light/dark mode toggle. Disabled via ::view-transition-old/new { animation: none } to hand off to JS clip-path animation. Falls back to instant swap.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a surface. Platform Blue background.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); color: oklch(98.6% 0.005 264.18); padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(54% 0.28 264.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and tertiary actions. Transparent at rest, muted surface on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(96% 0.008 264.18); color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: TopBar navigation. Active state uses Brand Tint + Platform Blue text.
components.html: HomeCapabilitiesAvailability
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { background-color: oklch(96% 0.008 264.18); color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); } .ds-nav-link--active { background-color: oklch(94% 0.05 264.18); color: oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Capability Card
components.description: Primary catalog item. Navigable; hover reveals border-strong + shadow-sm. No nested anchor ancestors.
components.html:
S3 Object Storage

Managed object storage with cross-region replication and lifecycle policies.

Platform Engineering#platform-storage
components.css: .ds-capability-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; background-color: oklch(99.5% 0.003 264.18); border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.01 264.18); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-capability-card:hover { border-color: oklch(82% 0.012 264.18); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-capability-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-capability-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-capability-card__meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; min-width: 0; } .ds-capability-card__name { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); margin: 0; } .ds-capability-card__description { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); margin: 0; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .ds-capability-card__arrow { color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-capability-card:hover .ds-capability-card__arrow { transform: translateX(2px); color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); } .ds-capability-card__footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); } .ds-capability-card__owner { font-weight: 600; color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); } .ds-capability-card__channel { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Inline search / filter field. Focus ring uses Platform Blue at 8% opacity.
components.html: <label class="ds-search-field"><svg class="ds-search-icon" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg><input class="ds-search-input" type="search" placeholder="Filter capabilities…" /></label>
components.css: .ds-search-field { display: flex; height: 36px; width: 100%; max-width: 420px; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.01 264.18); background-color: oklch(99.5% 0.003 264.18); transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: text; } .ds-search-field:focus-within { border-color: oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, oklch(46.28% 0.3059 264.18) 8%, transparent); } .ds-search-icon { color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; height: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: oklch(20% 0.02 264.18); } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Regional availability indicator. Semantic color pairs per status; IBM Plex Mono 10px.
components.html: us-east-1eu-west-1 Q3ap-south-1
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip--available { background-color: oklch(88% 0.06 152); color: oklch(38% 0.10 152); } .ds-chip--planned { background-color: oklch(92% 0.08 75); color: oklch(42% 0.12 75); } .ds-chip--unavailable { background-color: oklch(91% 0.01 264.18); color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); }

components.name: Mono Category Label
components.description: Section anchor in catalog views. IBM Plex Mono uppercase + count badge + horizontal rule. The signature structural element of Atlas.
components.css: .ds-category-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-category-label__name { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-category-label__count { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(48% 0.025 264.18); background-color: oklch(91% 0.01 264.18); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 1px 6px; } .ds-category-label__rule { flex: 1; border: none; border-top: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.01 264.18); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Atlas Portal is a briefing interface, not a discovery experience. Like a well-designed control room, it communicates state at a glance through structural discipline rather than spectacle: the right information, at the right density, with nothing in the way. Engineers arrive mid-task with a specific question and the interface answers without ceremony. Every screen earns attention through information integrity, not animation.

The visual system makes one strong commitment: Platform Blue carries the full weight of action and selection. All other surfaces are tinted near-neutrals that recede and let structured data speak. Depth is expressed through lightness steps alone; shadows appear only as state signals. IBM Plex Mono marks machine-structured vocabulary so that structural metadata is always visually distinct from human prose.

This system explicitly rejects: cream-and-purple SaaS gradient aesthetics; legacy enterprise blue-grey palettes with heavy sidebars; and DevRel marketing pages where large hero sections compensate for thin content.
keyCharacteristics: All neutrals tinted toward hue 264 (brand), never pure white or black
IBM Plex Sans for clarity; IBM Plex Mono exclusively for structured platform vocabulary
Flat-by-tonal-layering: depth through OKLCH lightness steps, not box-shadows
Platform Blue on ≤10% of any surface — reserved for action and selection
Monospace uppercase labels serve as structural section anchors, not decoration
Freshness signals are wired to real data or absent entirely

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Platform Blue is the singular action signal. Its signal value depends entirely on rarity — ≤10% of any screen. When Platform Blue appears, it means: act here, or this is selected. Nowhere else.

rules.name: The OKLCH-Only Rule
rules.body: All color values are OKLCH. Chroma is always reduced as lightness approaches 0 or 100. No #000 or #fff anywhere.

rules.name: The Tint Discipline Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in the system is tinted toward hue 264. A chroma of 0.005 is imperceptible but load-bearing. Pure greys are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono Structural Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono at 11px/uppercase/semibold is reserved for structured platform vocabulary. It signals 'this is a system value.' Never use Mono for conversational, decorative, or running prose.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface without a shadow is a surface at rest. Shadows appear only in response to interactive state (hover on navigable cards). Shadows on static surfaces are prohibited.

dos: Do use Platform Blue only for interactive and selected states. Keep its coverage to ≤10% of any screen.
Do use IBM Plex Mono uppercase (11px, 600, 0.05em tracking) for platform vocabulary: topic types, authority levels, category slugs, API codes, support channel names.
Do express depth through OKLCH lightness steps. Cards appear elevated because they are lighter than canvas, not because they cast a shadow.
Do wire freshness indicators ('Live', 'Synced') to real data before showing them.
Do keep body line length under 56ch for descriptive prose.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 264. A chroma of 0.005 is enough.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable or minimize animations.
Do expose broken anchors, stale sources, and unavailable services with semantic chips — calmly, without alarm styling.
donts: Don't use cream backgrounds, purple gradients, glowing card effects, or AI-generated SaaS aesthetics.
Don't reproduce legacy enterprise patterns: heavy blue-grey palettes, accordion-nested tables, deep sidebar nesting.
Don't use large hero sections, flashy scroll effects, or animation that compensates for thin content.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use a single solid color.
Don't show 'Live', 'Synced just now', or any freshness indicator as decorative copy.
Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Every surface, text, and border is a tinted OKLCH value.
Don't add box-shadows to static surfaces. shadow-sm is a hover state, not ambient depth.
Don't use IBM Plex Mono for conversational, decorative, or non-structured text.
Don't wrap interactive cards in an outer <a> tag that contains other <a> elements.
